title: DFU - Emu/Tern - Charge Case update needed popup after earbud DFU
scenario: "Case Update Needed" popup appears on Device Home Screen after earbud DFU when charge case firmware is outdated, directing user to Poly Lens Desktop app
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
3. Connect a pair of Voyager Free 60+ or Free 20 earbuds where both the earbuds and the charge case are on outdated firmware.
4. Initiate and complete a Device Firmware Update (DFU) for the earbuds via the app.
5. Observe the Home screen after the earbud DFU completes.
expected: A popup appears on the Device Home Screen stating "Case Update Needed" with a message that the earbuds have been updated but the case update must be done using the Poly Lens Desktop app.
